description: The Porsche Taycan, produced since 2019, is Porsche's first fully electric car. Its dual-motor powertrain produces up to 952 bhp in Turbo GT form, with a unique 800V architecture enabling ultra-fast charging. Available as saloon, Sport Turismo, and Cross Turismo body styles.
